name: Advance America - Southeast
description_short: Advance America offers same-day installment loans from $200–$5,000 at its Las Vegas, NV location, marketed as a higher-limit alternative to payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized short-term and installment lender with a physical branch at 4001 S. Decatur Blvd, Suite 7 in Las Vegas, Nevada, located inside Renaissance Center West. The company serves millions of consumers across the United States and describes itself as fully accredited. This Las Vegas location has accumulated a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,418 reviews, with more than 200,000 Google reviews across the brand.

The primary product offered at this location is an Installment Loan, available both in-store (up to $5,000) and online (up to $3,000), with a minimum of $200. Unlike a single-payment payday loan, installment loans are repaid through multiple scheduled payments over time, which the company positions as offering larger amounts and longer repayment periods than traditional payday products. The store also provides Western Union money transfer services. To apply, borrowers need a government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and a Social Security Number or ITIN. Pre-qualification is available by phone before visiting.

What distinguishes this location is its bilingual staff — the store explicitly advertises Spanish-speaking service — and its same-day funding capability in-store. Operating hours run Monday through Friday 10am–6pm and Saturday 10am–3pm, with Sunday closures. The branch also runs a referral program offering a $50 reward for each new borrower referred who originates a loan.

Advance America serves a consumer segment that cannot access traditional bank credit and needs fast cash, typically same-day. While installment repayment is more consumer-friendly than a single payday balloon payment, these loans are categorized as high-cost credit. The website does not disclose APRs, which is a significant transparency gap — rates on short-term installment loans from lenders in this category routinely exceed 100% APR. Consumers should compare the total repayment cost against other options before borrowing.
address: 4001 S Decatur Blvd Suite 7, Las Vegas, NV 89103

company_info.headquarters: 4001 S Decatur Blvd Suite 7, Las Vegas, NV 89103

pros: Same-day in-store funding available at the Las Vegas branch
Installment repayment structure — multiple payments over time rather than a single balloon payment
In-store loan amounts up to $5,000, higher than typical payday alternatives
4.9/5 star rating from 125,418 reviews indicates strong customer service consistency
Phone pre-qualification available before visiting the store
Online loan option ($200–$3,000) for borrowers who cannot visit in person
cons: APR is not disclosed anywhere on the store page — a major transparency gap typical of high-cost short-term lenders
Online loan cap ($3,000) is lower than the in-store cap ($5,000), limiting remote borrowers
Requires a checking account — no option for unbanked borrowers
Closed Sundays and early close on Saturdays (3pm), limiting access for full-time workers
Despite installment framing, Advance America is a subprime short-term lender — costs will be significantly higher than banks, credit unions, or payday alternative loans (PALs)
best_for: Las Vegas residents who need $200–$5,000 same-day and cannot qualify for a bank personal loan
Borrowers who prefer in-person service with Spanish-language support
Consumers who need more than a typical payday loan ($500) but cannot access traditional installment credit
People who want scheduled multi-payment repayment rather than a single-payment payday structure
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers with limited credit access who need fast cash between $200 and $5,000 and prefer in-person service with flexible installment repayment. The main caveat is that APRs are not disclosed on the website and are almost certainly very high — borrowers should request the full APR and total cost of credit before signing, and should exhaust credit union PALs or employer advance programs first.
services: Referral rewards program ($50 per new borrower referred)
In-person loan application and account management
